creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
My apology, I was in a hurry when issuing this PR:

First: we build our ports ourselfs via poudriere. poudriere is of the most recent version which could be found in the tree.
The building host is most recent CURRENT with a recent 12-STABLE jail, I post further below the head of a logfile to document that.

Second: net/asterisk16 is at :

[...]
Asterisk 16.6.1, Copyright (C) 1999 - 2018, Digium, Inc. and others.
Created by Mark Spencer <markster@digium.com>
Asterisk comes with ABSOLUTELY NO WARRANTY; type 'core show warranty' for details.
This is free software, with components licensed under the GNU General Public
License version 2 and other licenses; you are welcome to redistribute it under
certain conditions. Type 'core show license' for details.
=========================================================================
Running as user 'asterisk'
Running under group 'asterisk'
Connected to Asterisk 16.6.1 currently running on gate (pid = 1311)
[...]

poudriere log file header:

[...]
Poudriere version: 3.3.2_1
Host OSVERSION: 1300054
Jail OSVERSION: 1201500
Job Id: 02
[...]

The PJSIP version is that one most recent residing in the ports tree (HEAD I suppose). The packages installed on the appliance are:

Configuration of asterisk16:

# more options
# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for asterisk16-16.6.1
_OPTIONS_READ=asterisk16-16.6.1
